summary: A user stop from Bambu Studio must emit print.canceled even when H2D reports FAILED state and carries the cancel code in fail_reason rather than print_error.
reason: H2D manual cancellation reports gcode_state FAILED, print_error 0, mc_print_error_code 0, and fail_reason 50348044. Checking only print_error misclassifies an explicit user cancellation as a printer failure.
validated_outcome: The captured Studio-stop report emits exactly one canceled transition and suppresses the otherwise-derived failed transition.
